headline: Ecolab Inc. acquired Meridian Bird Removal.
summary: Ecolab Inc. acquired Meridian Bird Removal on April 20, 2026. Meridian Bird Removal employees joining Ecolab. Ecolab Inc. completed the acquisition of Meridian Bird Removal on April 20, 2026....
